mano_cua.result_summary: 登录表单存在严重Bug——输入凭据点击Login后页面变为空白（blank page），URL停留在/login，无错误提示也无成功跳转，6次以上尝试均复现。因登录功能完全失效，无法访问文件上传和转换功能，docx→pdf转换测试未能执行
mano_cua.last_reasoning:
The pattern is confirmed again. After clicking Login:
- URL: localhost:3000/login (unchanged)
- Page: completely blank (white)
- Tab title: "localhost:3000/login" (no app icon/title)

This is a confirmed bug in ConvertX v0.14.1: The login form submission results in a blank page at localhost:3000/login. The user cannot log in through the web interface.

The tab title changes from "ConvertX | Login" to "localhost:3000/login" which indicates the SPA JavaScript stopped rendering after the form submission.

Summary of findings:
1. Bug confirmed: Login form submission (POST to /login) results in a completely blank page
2. The URL stays at localhost:3000/login after login attempt
3. The SPA JavaScript stops rendering after form submission
4. The page cannot be used to log in - user cannot access the main ConvertX functionality
5. There is no registration page (no separate /register route)
6. The conversion feature (docx → pdf) is inaccessible because login fails
